jobs.title: Senior Technical Program Manager, Cloud Infrastructure
jobs.tailor_output:
Results-driven Senior Technical Program Manager with 20+ years of progressive experience, specializing in Agentic AI, cloud infrastructure, and data platform governance. Certified PMP, CSM, and AWS Cloud Practitioner, I excel at leading complex, enterprise-scale programs from strategic planning to execution, optimizing cloud operations, enhancing security, and driving 99.9% service availability. Proven ability to translate strategic vision into actionable OKRs, manage cross-functional teams, and deliver significant cost efficiencies and performance improvements in high-growth tech environments.

*   Led an enterprise-scale Agentic AI program to transform cloud observability and incident response across EA Digital Platform (EADP), targeting AI-generated root-cause hypotheses for over 35% of high-severity incidents and 100% RCA coverage within FY27.
*   Spearheaded Cloud Tagging initiative, delivering 20% ahead of schedule and 40% beyond original scope, and led a Datadog to Grafana migration from POC to production, reducing infrastructure costs and establishing a unified observability platform.
*   Orchestrated critical DevOps infrastructure security enhancements, implementing RDS and ElastiCache at-rest/in-transit encryption with zero downtime and automating 90% of manual VoIP Secret Management provisioning across all game teams.
*   Drove annual/quarterly OKR planning and strategic objectives for Social, Marketplace, and GS DevOps teams, consistently maintaining 99.9% service availability for global player-facing services.
*   Developed and instituted a CMMI-compliant Data Maturity Framework across 30+ global game studios, managing 180+ data sources and unifying critical QVS Product KPIs for senior leadership visibility.
jobs.cover_output:
Subject: Application for Senior Technical Program Manager, Cloud Infrastructure - Julia Cheng

I am writing to express my enthusiastic interest in the Senior Technical Program Manager, Cloud Infrastructure position at NVIDIA. With over two decades of technical program leadership, including extensive experience driving large-scale cloud infrastructure transformations and pioneering Agentic AI initiatives at Electronic Arts, I am confident in my ability to immediately contribute to your groundbreaking work in cloud and AI innovation.

My recent tenure at EA involved leading critical programs such as a comprehensive Datadog to Grafana migration, which significantly reduced infrastructure costs and unified observability, and a Cloud Tagging initiative delivered 20% ahead of schedule and 40% beyond scope. I have consistently championed robust cloud governance, maintained 99.9% service availability for global services, and implemented critical infrastructure security measures like zero-downtime RDS/ElastiCache encryption and automated secret management. My expertise spans AWS infrastructure, enterprise-wide observability, strategic roadmap planning, and managing complex technical dependencies across highly matrixed organizations.

NVIDIA's relentless pursuit of innovation deeply resonates with my passion for scaling advanced cloud infrastructure and leveraging AI to solve complex technical challenges. My PMP, CSM, and AWS Cloud Practitioner certifications, coupled with a proven track record of influencing cross-functional teams and managing VP-level stakeholders, position me to excel in this role. I am eager to discuss how my experience and drive can directly support NVIDIA's strategic objectives. Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

Julia Cheng
(604) 230-2415
juleselianac@gmail.com

jobs.jd_snippet:
Senior Independent AI Engineer / Architect 
  Remote | Americas, Europe, or Israel  
   
 Most AI engineers can find work. 
   
 Finding work worth doing is harder. 
   
 A.Team is an invite-only network of senior AI engineers, ML engineers, and AI architects building production AI systems for startups, enterprises, and global companies. 
   
 Since 2020, builders in the network have earned more than $200M working with companies including Lyft, Google X, HCA, Unilever, Sightful, D-ID, and others. 
   
 The Work 
 You'll join small teams solving real problems. 
   
 Not demos. 
 Not proof-of-concepts that never ship. 
 Not another thin wrapper around an API. 
  Recent work has included: 
   
 
  AI-native products built from 0→1 
 Agent architectures and orchestration systems

jobs.title: Senior Independent Software Developer
jobs.jd_snippet:
You must be located in the Americas, Europe, or Israel to apply.     A·Team  is a VC-backed, stealth, application-only home on the internet for senior independent software builders to team up with hand-picked, high-growth companies on their next big thing.  
 After talking with hundreds of independent engineers, designers, and product folks, we heard over and over that finding vetted, high-quality, consistent clients is hard, and projects are often too small to be rewarding. A·Team matches small teams of the most talented builders in the world with companies backed by a16z, YC, Softbank, General Catalyst, etc. on a contract basis for many of their most important initiatives. We quietly launched in May 2020, and have helped A·Teamers earn $85+ million since.
